# mlir-opt crashes in mlir/lib/IR/AffineMap.cpp:787

**Author:** Emilyaxe
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173568
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** mlir, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-01-06T00:28:46Z

## Body

When running opt on the following IR, mlir-opt crashes. 


version 2c02e4c7909a

test.mlir

```
#map = affine_map<(d0, d1) -> (d0 * 128 + d1)>
#map1 = affine_map<()[s0] -> (s0 ceildiv 128)>
#map2 = affine_map<(d0, d1, d2) -> (d0 mod 128, (d1 ceildiv 128) + d2, d1 floordiv 128)>
module {
  func.func @test_subi_tensor(%arg0: tensor<8x8xi64>, %arg1: tensor<8x8xi64>) -> tensor<8x8xi64> {
    %0 = linalg.generic {indexing_maps = [#map, #map1, #map2], iterator_types = ["parallel", "parallel", "reduction"]} ins(%arg0, %arg1 : tensor<8x8xi64>, tensor<8x8xi64>) outs(%arg0 : tensor<8x8xi64>) {
    ^bb0(%in: i64, %in_0: i64, %out: i64):
      %1 = arith.subi %in, %in_0 : i64
      linalg.yield %1 : i64
    } -> tensor<8x8xi64>
    return %0 : tensor<8x8xi64>
  }
}

```


commads:

mlir-opt test.mlir

stacktrace

```
mlir-opt: llvm-project/mlir/lib/IR/AffineMap.cpp:787: AffineMap mlir::inversePermutation(AffineMap): Assertion `map.getNumSymbols() == 0 && "expected map without symbols"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
```

<details>
When running opt on the following IR, mlir-opt crashes. 


version 2c02e4c7909a

test.mlir

```
#map = affine_map&lt;(d0, d1) -&gt; (d0 * 128 + d1)&gt;
#map1 = affine_map&lt;()[s0] -&gt; (s0 ceildiv 128)&gt;
#map2 = affine_map&lt;(d0, d1, d2) -&gt; (d0 mod 128, (d1 ceildiv 128) + d2, d1 floordiv 128)&gt;
module {
  func.func @<!-- -->test_subi_tensor(%arg0: tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;, %arg1: tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;) -&gt; tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt; {
    %0 = linalg.generic {indexing_maps = [#map, #map1, #map2], iterator_types = ["parallel", "parallel", "reduction"]} ins(%arg0, %arg1 : tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;, tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;) outs(%arg0 : tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;) {

      %1 = arith.subi %in, %in_0 : i64
      linalg.yield %1 : i64
    } -&gt; tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;
    return %0 : tensor&lt;8x8xi64&gt;
  }
}
```

### Comment 4 - sweiglbosker

### Comment 5 - linuxlonelyeagle

> [@linuxlonelyeagle](https://github.com/linuxlonelyeagle) are you working on this? Because im rewriting the verifier in [#173434](https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/173434) and it might be nice to fit this fix in there

Thank you for your contribution to the community. I didn't try to fix it, but @milos1397 would like to address it. This bug may be different from the one you are handling. You can see `#map1 = affine_map<()[s0] -> (s0 ceildiv 128)>`
and `AffineMap.cpp:787: AffineMap mlir::inversePermutation(AffineMap): Assertion map.getNumSymbols() == 0 && expected map without symbols"' failed.` Maybe we should print this error out in some way.


---

### Comment 6 - sweiglbosker

Oops, mentioned the wrong person. This interface is super buggy in general because it makes a bunch of calls to the interface in the verifier. Same case here, we check that there are no symbols, but only after inverting the map.

---
